zh.lifeSummary: 當Countess Elisabeth Von Waldeck於1289年出生在瓦爾德可-爾蒙特艾達瓦爾德可時，她的父親Otto I. von Waldeck27歲，母親Sophie Von Hessen-Brabant26歲。她於1305年與Dietrich Graf Von Honstein-Heringen-Tonna III結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1371年10月24日享年82歲，埋葬在德國史萊斯維-爾斯坦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Countess Elisabeth Von Waldeck于1289年出生在瓦爾德可-爾蒙特艾達瓦爾德可时，她的父亲Otto I. von Waldeck27岁，母亲Sophie Von Hessen-Brabant26岁。她于1305年与Dietrich Graf Von Honstein-Heringen-Tonna III结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1371年10月24日享年82岁，埋葬在德国史萊斯維-爾斯坦。

nameMeanings.name: Von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Waldeck
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German and Jewish (western Ashkenazic): habitational name from a place in Hesse, on the Eder river, probably named from Old High German wald ‘wood, forest’ + ecka, egga ‘corner’, ‘nook’.

variants.name: Waldock
meanings: Dutch: habitational name from a place called Waldeck in South Holland or one in Germany, near Koblenz.

English (Hertfordshire): apparently a variant of the Yorkshire surname Weldrick, a habitational name from Wheldrake in East Yorkshire. The placename probably derives from Old English cweld ‘death, place where a death took place’ + ric ‘narrow strip of land, narrow road’.

variants.name: Waldecker
meanings: German: habitational name for someone from any of various places called   Waldeck  .

nameMeanings.name: Elisabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

variants.name: Elizabeth
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Countess Elisabeth Von Waldeck was born in 1289, in Waldeck, Eder, Waldeck-Pyrmont, her father, Otto I. von Waldeck, was 27 and her mother, Sophie Von Hessen-Brabant, was 26. She married Dietrich Graf Von Honstein-Heringen-Tonna III in 1305. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 24 October 1371, at the age of 82, and was buried in Schleswig-Holstein, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Countess Elisabeth Von Waldeck est née en 1289, à Waldeck, Eder, Waldeck-Pyrmont, son père, Otto I. von Waldeck, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Sophie Von Hessen-Brabant, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Dietrich Graf Von Honstein-Heringen-Tonna III en 1305. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 24 octobre 1371, à l’âge de 82 ans, et a été enterrée à Schleswig-Holstein, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Countess Elisabeth Von Waldeck 1289 in Waldeck, Eder, Waldeck-Pyrmont geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Otto I. von Waldeck 27 und ihre Mutter Sophie Von Hessen-Brabant 26. Sie hat 1305 Dietrich Graf Von Honstein-Heringen-Tonna III geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 24. Oktober 1371 im Alter von 82 Jahren und wurde in Schleswig-Holstein, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Countess Elisabeth Von Waldeck è nata il nel 1289 nel Waldeck, Eder, Waldeck-Pyrmont, sua padre, Otto I. von Waldeck, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Sophie Von Hessen-Brabant, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Dietrich Graf Von Honstein-Heringen-Tonna III nel 1305. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 24 ottobre 1371, all'età di 82 anni, e fu sepolta a Schleswig-Holstein, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Countess Elisabeth Von Waldeckが1289年にワルデク-プイルモントイーダーワルデックで生まれた時，父Otto I. von Waldeckは27歳，母Sophie Von Hessen-Brabantは26歳であった。1305年にDietrich Graf Von Honstein-Heringen-Tonna IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1371年10月24日に82歳で死去し，ドイツスチレスウィグ-hオルステインにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Countess Elisabeth Von Waldeck(이)가 1289년 월덱-p이몽 에더 월덱에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Otto I. von Waldeck(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sophie Von Hessen-Brabant(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1305년 Dietrich Graf Von Honstein-Heringen-Tonna III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1371년 10월 24일 82세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 슐레스위그-홀스타인에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Countess Elisabeth Von Waldeck nasceu em 1289, em Waldeck, Eder, Waldeck-Pyrmont, seu pai, Otto I. von Waldeck, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Sophie Von Hessen-Brabant, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Dietrich Graf Von Honstein-Heringen-Tonna III em 1305. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 24 de outubro de 1371, com 82 anos, e foi sepultada em Schleswig-Holstein, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Countess Elisabeth Von Waldeck родилась в 1289 г. в местности валдекк, эдир, валдекк-пирмонт, её отцу по имени Otto I. von Waldeck было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Sophie Von Hessen-Brabant, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Dietrich Graf Von Honstein-Heringen-Tonna III в 1305 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла 24 октября 1371 г. в возрасте 82 лет и была похоронена в местности щлесвиг-холстин, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Countess Elisabeth Von Waldeck nació en 1289, en Waldeck, Eder, Waldeck-Pyrmont, su papá, Otto I. von Waldeck, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Sophie Von Hessen-Brabant, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Dietrich Graf Von Honstein-Heringen-Tonna III en 1305. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 24 de octubre de 1371, a la edad de 82 años, y fue sepultada en Schleswig-Holstein, Alemania.
